name: product-hunt-launch-leads
description: Search recent Product Hunt launches by topic or keyword and return product, traction, website, and maker fields.
business_value: Fresh startup lead discovery, partnership sourcing, PR monitoring, and competitor watch.

inputs.name: topic
inputs.note: Topic or keyword used to filter launches.

verification_result: Example fixture validates launch lead rows with product traction and maker fields.
known_risks: GraphQL complexity and request rate limits apply.
Maker and website fields may be incomplete.
